scaffolds.name: baseline
scaffolds.description: Run the task with the base prompt only.

scaffolds.name: tool-assisted
scaffolds.description: Ask for a compact plan before coding and return only executable code.
scaffolds.prompt_prefix: First think through the solution briefly, then write the final code. Return only executable code.

scaffolds.name: retrieval-assisted
scaffolds.description: Encourage checking the provided task details carefully before coding and then return only executable code.
scaffolds.prompt_prefix: Review the task details carefully, identify the required output format, and then return only executable code.
